name: bluealpha-marketing-plugin
description: Paid media strategy, analysis, and measurement powered by BlueAlpha's unified MCP (Google Ads + Meridian MMM). 20 skills: 10 Google Ads (competitive conquest, SEO-paid bridging, creative refresh, audience intelligence, incrementality testing, geo expansion, full-account optimization) plus 10 MMM-focused (budget reallocation, saturation analysis, model health-check, performance digest, launch timing, channel deep-dive, per-channel trust routing, quarterly test roadmap, MMM-vs-platform attribution reconciliation, scenario planning) — all analysis-only with execution routed through the BlueAlpha pipeline. Requires the bluealpha-mcp connector.
